_comment: Pinned Tailwind v4 standalone-CLI binaries for the meeting-scribe Tailwind build. SHAs verified against the upstream sha256sums.txt for the corresponding release on the date the version field was last bumped. To upgrade: bump version, fetch upstream sha256sums.txt for that tag, paste the new hashes here, and re-run scripts/install_tailwind.py on every developer machine and on CI. Hash mismatch on install is a hard fail (likely supply-chain tampering or a stale repo checkout).
